segments.text: This then was the lot of the tribe of the children of Judah by their families; even to the border of Edom the wilderness of Zin southward was the uttermost part of the south coast.
And their south border was from the shore of the salt sea, from the bay that looketh southward:
And unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh he gave a part among the children of Judah, according to the commandment of the LORD to Joshua, even the city of Arba the father of Anak, which city is Hebron.
He that smiteth Kirjath-sepher, and taketh it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter to wife.
segments.speaker: Caleb

segments.text: And it came to pass, as she came unto him, that she moved him to ask of her father a field: and she lighted off her ass;
Give me a blessing; for thou hast given me a south land; give me also springs of water.
segments.speaker: Achsah

segments.text: As for the Jebusites the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the children of Judah could not drive them out: but the Jebusites dwell with the children of Judah at Jerusalem unto this day.
